benefits.description: Stays lean and maintains 6-pack in mid-40s; maintains 20-year-old body appearance

side_effects.description: Gained 20 lbs of belly fat after 3-month break despite very good diet and decent exercise; attributed to possible feedback inhibition and suppression of natural GH production

protocol_notes: 6 years of use with protocol: 5 days on, 2 days off, 1 month off every 6 months. Started at age 40, took 3-month break at age 46 which resulted in weight gain. Naturally tall, thin, lanky frame; does not expect huge muscle gains from peptides. Reports safe and effective experience with good results for maintaining physique and youthful appearance. Frame type may limit anabolic response.
